project_name: The AI Race No One Can Afford to Win
video_idea: A modern cinematic documentary examining whether the greatest AI danger comes not from a single malicious machine but from a competitive system rewarding speed and market dominance over safety, weighed against the counter-risk that strict AI control could concentrate unprecedented power in a small number of corporations and governments.
target_audience: General English-speaking YouTube audience interested in technology, power, science, geopolitics, and hidden risks
reference_channel_style: modern cinematic documentary; serious, evidence-led, balanced, tense but not sensationalist
